title: [FIRRTL] MemTap could be broken with aggregate preservation

features.name: memory_register_unpacked_array
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration as an unpacked array of registers with address dimension

features.name: packed_2d_array_wire
features.description: Code should include a packed 2D array wire declaration where both dimensions are part of the same vector

features.name: unpacked_to_packed_array_assignment
features.description: Code should include an assignment from an unpacked array memory to a packed array wire which is illegal in Verilog
